title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Kinemon, Luffy, Rebecca, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #15 as law faces Doflamingo and Fujitora as the Caesar exchange collapses, while Luffy’s group remains tied up in the Colosseum and Dressrosa’s secrets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, it's you...! Uh, you're...

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: It's Rebecca. You've sure got a lot of people after you! Come this way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah, thanks a lot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Zethahaha come to think of it, the same could be said of shiliew, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But we're talking about Aokiji here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No way we can trust him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah, hold on Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's Strawhat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's there, with you right now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Strawhat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can you really afford to be here right now? It's about to begin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your brother's execution, that is... Zehahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So it's you, black- beard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right. It's been a while... Zehaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I heard you entered the tournament, "Lucy".

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But the Mera Merat No mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: is going to my burgers, here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll be so happy... it'll be as if ace had really joined my crew...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You know, he turned down that offer way back when.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...!! Ace's power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll make sure it goes to anyone except you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Willia- haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Someone you know? That pirate just now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You could say that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If nothing else, I won't let them win this thing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: *SCUSE ME LADY, CAN I HAVE ANOTHER SAMPLE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You just had one! Are you going to buy something or not!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh come u on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, ma'am!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Which would you like, Lucy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Eh!? You are gonna buy one for me!?

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Who's this, Rebecca? A friend of yours?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thanks for your business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Sorry, I didn't have much money!

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: No, no, thanks for treating me, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But where are we?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This is where the Glada- Tors of our colosseum are lodged...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: some call it the "Prison dorms".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Guest Partici- Pants Don't Come Here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So you should be fine until you have to go out again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Really? That's great!

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Rebecca: Corrida Colosseum fulltime gladiator

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, well...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That was an amazing match. You really surprised me with your strength, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But how is this Col- Ossum lunchbox so tasty!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...and aren't you hungry!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mommy ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm hungry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm... fine. Don't worry about me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Hmm? You're acting like one of those Samurai.

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
